response.overview: Surathali is a 1956 Sri Lankan film directed by Cyril P. Abeyratne. The film stars Ravindra Rupasena, Leena de Silva, Ananda Jayaratne,  Rohini Jayakody,  L. M. Perera,  Premila Kuruppu, Lilian Edirisinghe, Sirimathi Rasadari. Released on 12 September. First Sinhala film to be released through Ceylon Entertainments circuit.H. R. Jothipalamade his film debut as a playback singer. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Surathali
